description: CompositionWhite t-shirt made of 100% knit polyester, with mesh panels on the sides below the short sleeves and on the upper to middle back, round neck with series branding printed on back neckline and nike swoosh logo printed on left shoulder bladeFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not use softeners or bleachTumble dry lowRemove immediately/do not allow fabric to lie on itself when wetDo not iron or dry cleanErgonomically designed to suit championship athletes, the nike t-shirt is ventilated exactly where it’s needed most to offer absolute breathability and fresh comfort. Perfect for runners, it’s a great wear even on warm days.
